title: Physicist

rationales.taskAutomation: AI can run large-scale numerical simulations and data-reduction pipelines, but formulating novel theory and designing new experiments remain deeply human.
rationales.toolMaturity: AI-assisted simulation, symbolic-math, and data-analysis tools are mature in computational physics workflows.
rationales.adoption: National labs and large research universities have adopted AI-assisted simulation broadly; smaller institutions lag on compute and tooling access.
rationales.agenticExposure: Agents can run simulation batches and reduce experimental data, but hypothesis generation and experimental apparatus design are not agent-reachable.

tasksAtRisk: Large-scale numerical simulation and parameter sweeps
Experimental data reduction and statistical analysis pipelines
Literature survey synthesis for grant proposals
tasksGrowing: Cross-disciplinary collaboration on frontier research questions
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 19-2012, p25-p75 rounded
insight: Simulation and data reduction increasingly run on AI-assisted pipelines, but designing the experiment and formulating the theory behind it remain the physicist's irreplaceable core.
